promoCards.title: Symphony
powers: Draw 2 cards. {Symphony} deals 1 target X sonic damage, where X = the number of your equipment cards in play plus 1.
incapacitatedAbilities: One player may draw a card.
One player may play a card.
Select a target. Increase the next damage dealt by that target by 2.

cards.title: Symphony
powers: Discard a silence card. You may play a measure card. You may draw a card.
incapacitatedAbilities: One player may draw 3 cards. If they do, they discard 2 cards.
One hero may use a power.
Select a target. Reduce the next damage dealt to that target by 2.

cards.title: Counterfrequency
body: At the end of your play phase, if you have 6 or more cards in hand, {Symphony} deals itself 3 irreducible lightning damage and you may destroy this card.
Once per round, when a target next to this card would deal damage, you may prevent it and draw 2 cards.
[b]Power:[/b] Move this card next to a target.

flavorQuotes.text: I'm about to turn up th-{BR}...{BR}!?

cards.title: Destructive Resonance
body: At the end of your play phase, if you have 6 or more cards in hand, {Symphony} deals itself 3 irreducible lightning damage and you may destroy this card.
powers: Destroy an ongoing, equipment, or non-target environment card. If a non-hero card was destroyed this way, draw 2 cards.

flavorQuotes.text: We were designed{BR}for construction and destruction.{BR}Choosing a new purpose has not{BR}reduced our efficiency.

cards.title: Encoded Transmission
body: Reveal the top card of a deck, then replace it.
Discard up to 2 cards.

flavorQuotes.text: Alert: buried munitions detected{BR}at the following coordinates...

cards.title: Escape Tone
body: When a non-hero target would deal damage, you may redirect it to {Symphony}. Reduce damage redirected this way by 1.
At the start of your turn, destroy this card.

flavorQuotes.text: This way, please. We will{BR}not let them hurt you.

cards.title: Expanded Ensemble
body: You may play an additional card during your play phase.
At the end of your play phase, if you have 6 or more cards in hand, {Symphony} deals itself 3 irreducible lightning damage and you may destroy this card.
At the end of your turn, draw 3 cards.

flavorQuotes.text: Ah, Symphony! And how many of{BR}yourselves will be joining us today?

cards.title: Fortissimo
body: Select a target. Increase the next damage dealt by that target to another target by 2.
Discard a silence card. You may discard a card.

cards.title: Half Rest
body: Another player may discard a card. If they do, they draw 3 cards.
Another player may discard a card. If they do, their hero regains 3 HP.
Discard a silence card. You may discard a card.

flavorQuotes.text: You exhibit symptoms of{BR}overexertion. We do not. Allow us to{BR}take point while you recover.

cards.title: Harmonize
body: Draw 3 cards. Discard a silence card.
Discard a card or play a measure card.
Discard a card or play a measure card.

flavorQuotes.name: Nearsight
flavorQuotes.text: Heavy hitters, keep them occupied{BR}while the stealth team extracts the{BR}hostages. Symphony, watch our backs.

cards.title: Inspiring Refrain
body: At the end of your play phase, if you have 6 or more cards in hand, {Symphony} deals itself 3 irreducible lightning damage and you may destroy this card.
At the end of your turn, draw 2 cards and up to 3 targets regain 1 HP.

flavorQuotes.text: Yeeeaaahhh! Who rocks?{BR}We rock! Uh-huh, uh-huh uh-huh uh-huh!

cards.title: Interference
body: {Symphony} deals 1 target 1 sonic damage. Until the start of your turn, reduce damage dealt by that target by 1.
Discard a silence card. If you did, draw a card.

cards.title: Nano-Fabrication
body: Search your deck or trash for a non-one-shot card and put it into your hand or into play. If you searched your deck, shuffle it.
If no card entered play this way, another player may discard a card.
If they do, they may play a non-one-shot card.

flavorQuotes.text: [b]Such[/b] an improvement over our{BR}usual contractors. You're [b]sure[/b] we can't{BR}hire you at Freedom Plaza?

cards.title: Obstacle Avoidance
body: Reduce damage dealt to {Symphony} by non-hero sources by 1.
At the end of your play phase, if you have 6 or more cards in hand, {Symphony} deals itself 3 irreducible lightning damage and you may destroy this card.
At the end of your turn, draw 3 cards.

cards.title: Pianissimo
body: Select a target. Reduce the next damage dealt to that target by another target by 2.
Discard a silence card. You may discard a card.

flavorQuotes.text: Look out belooooo-{BR}Oh! Great timing. Thanks!

cards.title: Solo
body: One hero regains 2 HP and may use a power.
Discard a silence card. If you did, draw a card.

cards.title: Sour Note
body: At the end of your play phase, if you have 6 or more cards in hand, {Symphony} deals itself 3 irreducible lightning damage and you may destroy this card.
powers: {Symphony} deals 1 target 4 sonic damage. Draw 2 cards.

flavorQuotes.text: There is immense value in beauty-{BR}but ugliness has its place, as well.

cards.title: Tune-Up
body: Draw 3 cards.
Discard up to 5 cards.

flavorQuotes.text: This instrument has{BR}changed since its construction,{BR}as have we. Rather than discard that{BR}experience, we move forward, together.

cards.title: Whole Rest
body: Destroy any number of your non-character cards. {Symphony} regains that much HP.
Discard any number of cards. {Symphony} deals itself X irreducible psychic damage and up to X other targets regain 1 HP, where X is the number of cards discarded this way.

flavorQuotes.name: Servo
flavorQuotes.text: Are you damaged?{BR}I'm sure I can come up with-
